claims.headline: Eases stress
claims.notesSentence: Oral GABA reduced stress markers and increased relaxation-associated EEG patterns in healthy adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GABA relaxation and stress study on PubMed

claims.headline: Improves sleep onset
claims.notesSentence: GABA supplementation reduced fatigue and improved recovery from stress-related sleep disturbances in a controlled human study.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GABA relaxation and sleep disturbance study on PubMed
